Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1BB0 "NAVYMOVES-PART2-1BB0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Navy Moves (Part 2).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Set $FF65 to $01 in the dump file to remove the access code protection.
